title: Renewable Energy Data Analysis & Predictive Modeling
description: Built regression models and visualizations to evaluate the relationship between declining solar costs and increased energy generation. Identified long-term trends in U.S. energy transition using statistical analysis and integrated 20+ years of data.

title: Housing Market Trend Analysis (Gentrification Study)
description: Analyzed 10+ years of housing price data across multiple counties to identify gentrification trends. Discovered correlations between income levels and home values using Python visualizations and heatmaps.

title: Behavioral Data Analysis: Music & Academic Stress
description: Analyzed student survey data to explore relationships between academic workload and music preferences. Built regression models and visualized trends using Python and Spotify API data.

title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: Designed and developed a responsive personal portfolio website using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with dynamic content rendering and dark mode support.

title: JavaScript Data Visualization Dashboard
description: Created an interactive dashboard to visualize datasets using JavaScript and dynamic DOM manipulation techniques.

title: Machine Learning Classification Project
description: Implemented classification models to predict outcomes based on structured datasets and evaluated model performance using accuracy and precision metrics.

title: Exploratory Data Analysis Toolkit
description: Developed reusable Python scripts for cleaning, analyzing, and visualizing datasets efficiently.

title: Time Series Analysis Project
description: Analyzed time-based data to identify seasonal trends and patterns using statistical methods.

title: Data Cleaning Automation Script
description: Built automation tools to clean and preprocess messy datasets, improving data quality and consistency.

title: API Data Integration Project
description: Integrated external APIs into data workflows to collect and analyze real-time data.

title: Statistical Analysis Report
description: Conducted statistical hypothesis testing and summarized insights in a structured report.

title: Interactive Web Form System
description: Built a JavaScript-powered form with validation, dynamic behavior, and improved user interaction.
